name: West Coast Construction
tagline: Family-run asphalt & concrete paving across Sonoma County for 40+ years
seoDescription: West Coast Construction is a family-owned Santa Rosa & Petaluma paving contractor — asphalt, sealcoating, grading, driveways and parking lots across Sonoma

sections.heading: Driveways and parking lots done right, by a 40-year family crew
sections.subheading: Owner Gary Stanley and his family have paved Sonoma County's homes and businesses for over four decades — asphalt, concrete, grading and sealcoating, from a cracked driveway to a full parking lot.

items.title: Family-Owned, 40+ Years
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Free Estimates

sections.heading: About West Coast Construction
body: West Coast Construction has proudly served the Greater Bay Area for more than 40 years. Owner Gary Stanley started the family business at a very young age and has built an extensive background in both residential and commercial construction, with his wife Tina Stanley running the office.

It's a full-service asphalt and concrete installation and repair company that handles everything from new parking lots to driveway cracks. Their customers range from homeowners to retail shopping centers, apartment complexes and commercial businesses across Santa Rosa, Petaluma and the rest of Sonoma County — new paving, repairs, or full tear-out and re-installation.

items.title: Asphalt Paving & Repair
items.description: New asphalt paving plus repairs, tear-outs and re-installations for driveways, parking lots and roadways — residential or commercial.

items.title: Concrete Paving
items.description: All types of concrete work — driveways, parking lots, foundations, patios, sidewalks, walkways and stairs.

items.title: Sealcoating
items.description: Sealcoating to protect and extend the life of asphalt surfaces and keep parking lots and driveways looking new.

items.title: Grading & Site Prep
items.description: Grading and surface preparation to set up driveways, lots and pads for a paving job that lasts.

items.title: Parking Lots
items.description: Commercial parking lots for retail centers, apartment complexes and businesses — from new construction to resurfacing and striping.

items.title: Driveways
items.description: Residential driveways in asphalt or concrete, from a single cracked apron to a complete replacement.

items.quote: Gary was organized, knowledgeable, on time, on budget.
items.author: Paving client

items.quote: Gary and his team are nothing but superior — he made challenging driveway work seem simple and did an amazing job.
items.author: Driveway client

items.quote: Great experience, very responsive — the project was started and completed in a very timely manner.
items.author: Sonoma County customer

sections.heading: Work with West Coast Construction
sections.body: Find us at 288 Scenic Ave. Call (707) 360-0017 — we’re glad to help.
